title: The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)
content:

'''''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook''''' was a roleplaying book published by [[West End Games]] for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|second edition]] of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' in early [[1994]].<ref name="SE" /> [[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook|First published]] in [[1990]], it was written by [[Paul Murphy]],<ref name="FE">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> and was revised for the Second Edition by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]]. The book covers the history, organization, technology, and tactics of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The book itself lists it release date as [[April]] 1994,<ref name="SE" /> while the the [[StarWars.com]] Cargo Bay later listed the release date as [[January 1]], 1994.<ref name="CargoSE">{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/7830|text=The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook, Second Edition}}</ref>

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''A terrible civil war burns throughout the galaxy. A rag-tag group of freedom fighters has risen from beneath the dark shadow of a tyrannical Empire: against all hope, they have dealt the oppressors a mighty blow.''

''Throughout the vastness of space, heroic beings engage in a desperate struggle against the overwhelming might of the Empire. They are ill-equipped and pitifully few, but their courage and determination has fostered new hope for freedom in the galaxy. These are the men, women, and aliens of the Rebel Alliance.''

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=
|text=A terrible civil war burns throughout the galaxy; a rag-tag group of freedom fighters has risen from beneath the dark shadow of the EVIL GALACTIC EMPIRE. Against all hope, they have dealt the oppressors a mighty blow.

But although the Death Star has been destroyed, Imperial troops have driven the freedom fighters from their hidden base and pursue them across the galaxy. The Emperor has turned his attention toward extinguishing this last spark of resistance, and everywhere the forces of the Empire have redoubled their efforts to seek out and destroy the elusive prey.

Throughout the vastness of space, valiant beings engage in a desperate struggle against the overwhelming might of the Empire. They are ill-equipped and pitifully few, but their courage and determination has fostered new hope for freedom in the galaxy.

These are the men, women, and aliens of the Rebel Alliance.}}

==Contents==
===Prologue: The Growing Rebellion===
*Introduction

===Chapter One: Birth of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]===
*[[Declaration of Rebellion/Legends|Declaration of Rebellion]]

===Chapter Two: Alliance Military===
===Chapter Three: [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]===
===Chapter Four: Combat Starships===
===Chapter Five: [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]]===
===Chapter Six: Ground Combat===
*Tactics 
**[[Battle of Tiems]]
*[[Infantry/Legends|Infantry]]
**Infantry Equipment
*[[Artillery/Legends|Artillery]]
*Ground Vehicles
**Combat Assault Vehicles
*Scout Units
*Ground Transport
*Air Support and Combat Vessels
**Airspeeders

===Chapter Seven: [[Droid/Legends|Droids]]===
*Droids:An Overview
*Acquisition and Development
*New Droid Types

===Chapter Eight: Alliance Bases===
*Overview of Alliance Bases
*Base Descriptions

===Chapter Nine: [[Support Services/Legends|Support Services]]===
*Alliance Support Services
*Space Transport
*Alliance Transport Vessels
*Medical Services

===Chapter Ten: Recruitment and Training===
*Overview
*Sources of Personnel
*Basic Training
*Officer's Training

===Chapter Eleven: Afterword: A Legacy for Our Children===
